name: app_icon
description: App icon composition: a cute knitted amigurumi dragon head (friendly, wide-eyed, red-orange yarn) peeking over a big teal yarn ball, on a soft knit-texture green field, framed tight and readable at 60px.
prompt_extra: full-bleed opaque square, subject fills ~70% of the canvas, readable at 60px

variants.name: warm
variants.prompt_extra: slightly warmer, cozier tones and a touch more craft detail

variants.name: clean
variants.prompt_extra: slightly simpler, more minimal composition with bolder shapes
